# ephemeralversion_from_map (Resource)

Derives a map of version strings from a write-only map of input values. Each key in `values` maps to the same key in `versions`, whose value is the MD5 hex digest of the input. `values` is write-only and is never stored in Terraform state. `versions` is recalculated on every apply.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

> **NOTE**: [Write-only arguments](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/language/resources/ephemeral#write-only-arguments) are supported in Terraform 1.11 and later.

- `values` (Map of String, Sensitive, [Write-only](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/language/resources/ephemeral#write-only-arguments)) Map of secret names to their values. Write-only: never stored in state.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Unique resource identifier (UUID). Generated once on creation and never changed.
- `versions` (Map of String) Map of secret names to the MD5 hex digest of their corresponding value. Recalculated on every apply.
